name: Cheap Shot
additional_info: Multiplies your PEN by 1.1x at 65+ Agility. Cheap Shot's PEN multiplier will be reduced by 0.11% for every point in Agility below 65, having a minimum multiplier of +7.22% PEN (or 1.072x PEN) at 40 Agility.
desc: Your attacks gain 10% PEN multiplicatively when you have an active speed boost.
